name: asana
description: Asana MCP server + Asana Admin Skill — keeps Asana up to date for CE workflows.

settings.name: Asana Personal Access Token
settings.description: Create one at: Asana → My Settings → Apps → Manage Developer Apps → Personal Access Tokens

settings.name: Asana Team GID
settings.description: The default team GID to scope Asana projects and requests to (e.g. 1213807836434813).

commands.name: admin:gap
commands.description: Run gap analysis on the local Asana MCP server

commands.name: admin:implement
commands.description: Implement a missing MCP tool by name

commands.name: admin:setup-fields
commands.description: One-time setup: create all 17 CE practice custom fields at org level in Asana

commands.name: admin:setup-template
commands.description: Build an Asana project from a JSON template definition. Usage: /admin:setup-template customer-project | awareness | pre-sales
